description: Year-by-year first-registered passenger cars by primary fuel (all statuses). Use when user asks EV adoption over time or fuel-trend by year. Historical, not current snapshot.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 2000 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2030 AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS total = COUNT(*), electric = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", diesel = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel", petrol = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Benzin" BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 30
